data.raceComments: {"comment":"14. PANDA'S SPECTRUM debuted over 1400m in solid order and then improved sharply, beaten a whisker over 1600m at Cranbourne. That's good form, and she will be fitter again. The inside gate will be advantageous, and Nolen is a positive jockey engagement. She's the one they have to beat. 2. SPIETATA resumed for a new barn following minor throat surgery, and it was a pass mark given the time away. He's placed over this trip at Cranbourne on debut, and with the extra fitness, he can get into the money. 7. RIVERLEA PRINCE worked home well and finished third last time over 1607m at Kilmore, beaten 2.75 lengths. Is likely to enjoy a softer run today and can get into the placings, presenting fitter. 3. WHATTA MAN maps for the run of the race and looked a run short at Sale. An improver to keep onside.","runners":[14,2,7,3],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: SEYMOUR-R4-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
